finalAssistantMessages.text: The hub pointer commit is made. I’m pushing hub `main` now, then I’ll do one final status check across the touched repo and hub before the concise handoff.
Hub push succeeded. I’m doing the final sanity check now: touched submodule clean, hub pointer pushed, and I’ll note the remaining unrelated dirty hub entries without disturbing them.

Done. Production review page is open at [http://127.0.0.1:3038/review](http://127.0.0.1:3038/review). QA counts: - Total queue rows: 92 - Active review rows: 4, all `needs_artist_review` - Rejected rows: 88 - Ready/publishing export: 0 items - Media attached: 4/4 - Missing media: 0 - Warnings: `missing-agent-image-description=4`, `draft-media-theme-mismatch=1` - Exact duplicate visible drafts: 0 - Duplicate openings: 0 - `matches-rejected-queue-memory`: 0 - Long English/source-debug fragments: 0 I also fixed and deployed a production queue hotfix: `artist-helper` commit `85ecb33` seeds duplicate checks from already-active queue rows, so repeated refill runs do not mix duplicate drafts into t
